chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 897 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.4169/2021 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 23.11.2022 Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. Through instant petition, the petitioners seek directions to respondents No.2 to 5 to demarcate their property bearing Survey No. 578, measuring 01-12 acres, situated at opposite Awais Colony, Chandia Morr, Khairpur. In response to the petition, comments have been filed by respondent No.4 (Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Khairpur), which reflects that as per report of Tapedar, Tapa Nizamani and Supervising Tapedar, Circle Khairpur, the aforesaid survey number is entered in the name of Shah Nawaz son of Muhammad Bachal according to Entry No.96. The appropriate remedy is available to the petitioners before Survey Superintendent, Khairpur; hence, the petition is dismissed by directing the petitioners to avail their remedy in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
